name: Dundee Games Meet-up!
description:
The final meet-up for anyone and everyone in the games industry!

Come along and connect with other game developers in a casual social night out! Games industry workers of all levels and backgrounds are welcome! Come as a group or fly solo, this is a friendly and inclusive space aiming to create a connected community of the people behind the games

Check out #DundeeGamesMeetup for information on previous events
short_description: Casual social night out for games industry workers of all levels and backgrounds in Dundee.
